title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 430.060 - Proceedings governed by laws concerning replevin where not specifically provided
text:
430.060.  Proceedings governed by laws concerning replevin where not specifically provided. — All proceedings under sections 430.010 to 430.070, where not herein otherwise specifically provided, shall be governed by the general laws of the state concerning replevin.
(RSMo 1939 § 3612) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 3222; 1919 § 7282
